## About



## What gets deployed

| Service | Source | Type |
|---------|--------|------|
| Patent-Descriptor | [Asharib706/Patent-Descriptor](https://github.com/Asharib706/Patent-Descriptor) | Web service |

## Environment variables

| Variable | Default |
| --------- | ------- |
| `API_KEY` | (secret) |

## Configuration

- **Start command:** `python app.py`
- **Networking:** Public domain with automatic HTTPS

**Category:** Other · **Languages:** Python
